title: The Unit Impulse Response h(t)
summary: This page concludes a discussion of resonance, explaining that when a system is driven by an input matching one of its characteristic modes, the response can grow without bound. It then begins Section 2.3, motivating the unit impulse response h(t), presenting the general Nth-order LTIC differential equation and its operator form, and introducing h(t) qualitatively as the response to δ(t) with zero initial conditions.
